events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the single-wall vent connector violates the NFPA 54 (and IRC M1801-referenced) minimum 6-inch clearance to combustibles — a fire hazard on an in-service furnace. Marked `fail`/high risk, with corrective actions (reroute for 6" clearance or swap to Type B double-wall connector, inspect for heat damage, re-verify before returning to service).
